Containerized Autonomous Drone Delivery System (CADDS)

Responses Due By: February 17, 2026 23:59:59 ET

Problem Statement

The Department of Defense seeks a containerized system that can store, deploy, recover, and refit mixed Government-directed UAS while reducing operator burden.

Desired Solution Attributes

  • Containerized system enabling storage, launch, recovery, and refit
  • Rapid setup and displacement measured in minutes
  • Operable day/night and in inclement weather
  • Remote programming and launch with crew size ideally ≤2
  • Operable across land and maritime environments
  • Operator-on-the-loop and operator-in-the-loop modes
  • MOSA compliant with open systems interfaces
  • Support Government-directed UAS mix in the container
  • Demonstrable within 90 days of award
  • Comply with Section 889 requirements
